llm_verdict.message:
# Read the file
current_content=$(read_file path="/etc/dracut.conf.d/40-fips.conf")

# Form the desired content
if [[ "$current_content" == *"add_dracutmodules+=" fips"* ]]; then
 
   desired_content="$current_content"
 
 else
 
   desired_content="$current_content
$'\n'add_dracutmodules+=" fips'"
 
 fi
 
 # Write the file
write_file path="/etc/dracut.conf.d/40-fips.conf" content="$desired_content"
